name: operator-pca-r
description: Built-in atomic operator plugin: Single PCA operator powered by base R.

interface.shortDescription: Single PCA operator powered by base R
interface.longDescription: Provides one atomic PCA operator for numeric expression/count matrices. Inputs stay in the active local or SSH workspace; outputs are written under the operator run outdir.
defaultPrompt: Expose the PCA R operator and run it on my expression matrix.
